name: froakie
flavor_texts: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.
It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.
text: Froakie is the Bubble Frog Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, protean (hidden). Base stats — HP: 41, Attack: 56, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 62, Sp. Def: 44, Speed: 71. Evolution line: froakie → frogadier → greninja. Lore: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked. It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.
